properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Commodore Krux is not unlocked with this skin. Commodore Krux can only be unlocked by completing Animated Giff - the second Variant of the Topolah's Tower adventure in the Light of Xaryxis Campaign.

backstory.original: Commodore Krux is a giff soldier who believes his glory days are behind him. Krux has spent the last few years working as a mercenary on and around the Rock of Bral, but lately the giff has been spending more time in his cups as new jobs have become fewer and farther between.
backstory.display: 克鲁克斯准将是一名吉夫士兵，他坚信属于他的荣耀终有一天会到来。克鲁克斯最近几年一直在布拉尔巨岩附近当雇佣兵，但这位吉夫人最近花大把时间买醉，因为新工作少得可怜。

description.original: Commodore Krux fires a pistol at a random target.
description.display: 克鲁克斯准将用手枪随机射击一个目标。

description.original: Commodore Krux throws a grenade at the enemy with the most health which deals damage and knocks enemies back.
description.display: 克鲁克斯准将向生命值最高的敌人投掷一颗手榴弹，对敌人造成伤害并将其击退。

longDescription.original: Commodore Krux throws a grenade at the enemy with the most health, which explodes dealing ultimate damage to all enemies in a medium radius and knocking them all back a short distance.
longDescription.display: 克鲁克斯准将向生命值最高的敌人投掷一颗手榴弹；手榴弹在爆炸时会对中等范围内的所有敌人造成杀招伤害，并将其击退一小段距离。

description.desc: Commodore Krux can be used in any Light of Xaryxis campaign adventure or variant, even if he would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
克鲁克斯准将可用于任何萨雷西斯之光战役冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。

conditions.desc: Commodore Krux increases the damage of all Champions in his column and the two rear-most columns of the formation by $(amount)%. This does not apply twice if he's in one of the two rear-most columns.
Commodore Krux increases the damage of all Champions in his column and the rear-most column of the formation by $(amount)%. This does not apply twice if that is the same column.
克鲁克斯准将使同列和阵型最后两列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。如果他位于最后两列，则此效果不会生效两次。
克鲁克斯准将使同列和阵型最后一列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。如果他位于最后一列，则此效果不会生效两次。

tipText.original: Commodore Krux buffs Champions who are in his column and the back column of the formation.
tipText.display: 克鲁克斯准将为同列和阵型后列的勇士提供增益。

description.desc: Commodore Krux increases the damage bonus of All Hands On Deck! by $(not_buffed amount)% for each second the Champions are in the current area, stacking multiplicatively up to a maximum of $(max_stacks) stacks.
克鲁克斯准将使“全员出动！”的伤害加成每秒提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，而且位于当前区域的勇士以乘算方式叠加，最多可叠加 $(max_stacks) 次。

Commodore Krux increases the health of all other Champions by $(amount)% of his max health for each adventure, variant, and Patron variant you have completed in the Light of Xaryxis campaign, stacking additively. Any healing effect on those Champions is increased by the same amount.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the health of $target and the effect of healing on $target by $amount

description.desc: 对于你在萨雷西斯之光战役中所完成的每个冒险、支线任务和赞助者支线任务，克鲁克斯准将会使所有其他勇士的生命值提高其最大生命值的 $(amount)%，以加算方式叠加。这些勇士身上的任何治疗效果有相同幅度的提高。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 提升$target的生命值，对$target的回复效果提升 $amount

description.desc: Upon completing a new area, Commodore Krux raises a spyglass to his eye and spots an enemy from the next area. All enemies of that type become his Favored Foe (until another area is completed) and take $(amount)% more damage from all sources.
在完成一个新区域时，克鲁克斯准将会举起他的望远镜，锁定下一个区域的一个敌人。该类型的所有敌人成为他的偏好对手（直到完成另一个区域为止）并且所有来源的伤害增加 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Commodore Krux is always looking ahead and chooses a Favored Foe from the next area when completing an area.
tipText.display: 当完成一个区域时，克鲁克斯准将总是会向前看，并在下一个区域中选择一个偏好对手。

description.desc: Commodore Krux gains the Control role and he increases the effect of All Hands On Deck! by $(amount)% and his base attack knocks back his targets a short distance.
克鲁克斯准将获得控制者角色，使“全员出动！”的效果提高 $(amount)%，而且他的基本攻击会将目标击退一小段距离。

specializationDescription.original: Commodore Krux focuses on buffing the party and the strength of his Flintlock Pistols.
specializationDescription.display: 克鲁克斯准将专注于强化队伍和他的燧发枪的力量。

description.desc: Commodore Krux increases the damage of Champions with a magic base attack by $(amount)%.
克鲁克斯准将使使用魔法基本攻击的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Commodore Krux focuses on buffing his magic-based allies.
specializationDescription.display: 克鲁克斯准将专注于强化他的魔法系盟友。

description.desc: Each time any favored foe is defeated, Commodore Krux increases the damage of All Hands On Deck! by $(amount)%, stacking additively up to $(max_stacks) times, until the area is changed.
每次打败任何偏好对手，克鲁克斯准将会使“全员出动！”的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以加算方式最多叠加 $(max_stacks) 次，直到区域被改变为止。

specializationDescription.original: Commodore Krux keeps a keen eye on Favored Foes and further buffs Champions when one is defeated.
specializationDescription.display: 克鲁克斯准将密切关注偏好对手，并且会在打败一个以后进一步强化勇士。

description.desc: Commodore Krux increases the effect of All Hands On Deck! by $(not_buffed amount)% for each adventure, variant, and Patron variant you have completed in the Light of Xaryxis campaign, stacking multiplicatively.
对于你在萨雷西斯之光战役中所完成的每个冒险、支线任务和赞助者支线任务，克鲁克斯准将会使“全员出动！”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式叠加。

description.original: I find listening to one's heart is the best course of action.
description.display: 我发现听从自己的心是最正确的做法。

description.original: We are stronger as a crew -- those scoundrels can not break that!
description.display: 团结使我们更强大--那些无赖休想得逞！

description.original: I once trained with an ancient eladrin just to observe my surroundings.
description.display: 我曾接受过远古雅灵的训练，并且学会了观察四周。

description.original: Haha! Just like my training!
description.display: 哈哈！和训练时一样！

description.original: Trying to break through a giff's hide is a losing fight.
description.display: 想要穿透吉夫人的毛皮，那你已经输了一半。

description.original: Never stop -- never concede!
description.display: 永不停止--永不认输！

description.original: Have at thee! Haha!
description.display: 看招！哈哈！

description.original: A spot of tea never fails to calm the nerves.
description.display: 几口茶总能平复紧张情绪。

description.original: It's an honor to call you all my crew.
description.display: 能称你为船员是我的荣幸。

description.original: This crew is like a well-oiled machine.
description.display: 这些船员就像上好润滑油的机器。

description.original: Welcome to the crew!
description.display: 欢迎加入队伍！

effects.description: Increases the number of columns buffed by All Hands On Deck! by additionally targeting the column second from the back.

description.original: Load the cannons, ready your weapons, send them to the hells!
description.display: 装填炮弹，准备好武器，把他们送入地狱！

description.original: Few can hide from my spyglass.
description.display: 几乎没人能逃出我的望远镜。

description.original: I've sailed more of the astral sea than most can imagine.
description.display: 我航行过的星界之海超出大多数人的想象。

description.original: Wildspace changes you. You have to decide if it's for the better.
description.display: 蛮荒太空会改变你。但你必须决定是不是往好的方向。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Commodore Krux's specialization choices by $amount%.

description.original: Judge me not by my size.
description.display: 不要以貌取人。

description.original: Ho oh! I'm a fiend with a bagpipe!
description.display: 哦吼！我是一头吹风笛的炼狱生物！

description.original: There's quite a bit of time in Wildspace for reading.
description.display: 在蛮荒太空，你有大把时间用来看书。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Commodore Krux is a giff soldier who believes his glory days are behind him. Krux has spent the last few years working as a mercenary on and around the Rock of Bral, but lately the giff has been spending more time in his cups as new jobs have become fewer and farther between.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Commodore Krux is a DPS, Tanking and Support Champion who is constantly updating his favored foe.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Commodore Krux is not unlocked with this skin. Commodore Krux can only be unlocked by completing Animated Giff - the second Variant of the Topolah's Tower adventure in the Light of Xaryxis Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 克鲁克斯准将是一名吉夫士兵，他坚信属于他的荣耀终有一天会到来。克鲁克斯最近几年一直在布拉尔巨岩附近当雇佣兵，但这位吉夫人最近花大把时间买醉，因为新工作少得可怜。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 克鲁克斯准将是一名坦克和支援型伤害输出勇士，会不时地更新他的偏好对手。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士克鲁克斯准将不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“动画吉夫人”——“萨雷西斯之光”战役中“托波拉的塔”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁克鲁克斯准将。
